name: Banana White Bread for ABM
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Finely mashed banana (from about 2 bananas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients as directed by the manufacturer.
2. Use a regular white bread cycle on your machine.
3. If the dough is too wet, gradually add more flour until you have a soft, pliable dough ball.
4. Add nuts during the last kneading cycle.
5. Optional: add cinnamon or 1 tsp banana extract for extra flavor.
6. Ensure the bananas are ripe for the best taste.
7. Allow the bread to cool completely before slicing. Enjoy!
